compiled_state.title: RED: Tests for roadmap scrutiny opt-in and caveat tag
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create tests/skills/test-roadmap-scrutiny-opt-in.sh with behavioral tests:

- Test 1: Roadmap SKILL.md contains scrutiny opt-in question text ('apply full scrutiny' or equivalent)
- Test 2: Roadmap SKILL.md references the shared scrutiny pipeline path (shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md)
- Test 3: Roadmap SKILL.md references scrutiny:pending tag writing via ticket edit on opt-out path
- Test 4: Tag contract document exists at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md
- Test 5: Tag contract defines field name, allowed values, and semantics (grep for required sections)

Add .test-index entry with RED marker.

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/skills/test-roadmap-scrutiny-opt-in.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] 5 test functions added
  Verify: grep -c '^test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-roadmap-scrutiny-opt-in.sh
- [ ] New tests FAIL (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-roadmap-scrutiny-opt-in.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendments

### Test enumeration (major)
Updated test list (5 tests):
- Test 1: Roadmap SKILL.md contains scrutiny opt-in question ('apply full scrutiny')
- Test 2: Roadmap SKILL.md references shared scrutiny pipeline on opt-in path
- Test 3: Roadmap SKILL.md writes scrutiny:pending tag on opt-out path (ticket edit tags)
- Test 4: Tag contract document exists at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md
- Test 5: Tag contract defines field name, allowed values, writer, and reader sections

### Test isolation (major → not applicable)
Tests use structural assertions (grep for text patterns in SKILL.md and contract doc). They do NOT exercise the tag API directly — they verify the SKILL.md instructions reference the correct tag-writing command. The tag API's behavioral correctness is tested by 4a74-872a's own tests.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests for scrutiny opt-in created
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
